name: Eggless Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all the ingredients, except the oil, in a blender.
2. Blend on the lowest speed.
3. Gradually add the oil to the mixture, one drop at a time, until it starts to thicken.
4. Continue blending until the mixture is thickened and smooth.
5. Transfer the mayonnaise to a jar and store in the refrigerator.
Makes 3/4 cup
Preparation Time: 20 minutes
